name: Mikhaïl Katoukov
longDesc: Mikhaïl Katoukov commande la 1re armée de chars de la garde de Koursk à Berlin, spécialiste reconnu du combat blindé soviétique. Carte WC4 équilibrée tier-S or : profil armor-lourd avec bonus de moral élevé, pivot d'une stack rouge orientée percée.

skills.name: Armored Tactic Expert
skills.desc: Recover 6% maximum HP on the next turn when the armored units are more than half damaged

skills.name: Organisation
skills.desc: Recover 6% maximum HP on the next turn when the infantry units are more than half damaged

skills.name: Blitzkrieg
skills.desc: 12% chance that the enemy will not fight back when commanding armored units

skills.name: Camouflage
skills.desc: Able to dodge 12% damage from the enemy's air units

skills.name: Elastic Defence
skills.desc: Fix nearby fortress units: each round HP+4

sources: Données extraites des fichiers de jeu World Conqueror 4
longDescEn: Mikhail Katukov led the 1st Guards Tank Army from Kursk to Berlin, a recognised Soviet armoured-warfare specialist. A WC4 tier-S gold balanced card with an armor-heavy profile and strong morale bonuses — the anchor of a Soviet breakthrough stack.
longDescDe: Michail Katukow führte die 1. Garde-Panzerarmee von Kursk bis Berlin und gilt als anerkannter sowjetischer Panzerkriegs-Spezialist. Im WC4 eine S-Klasse-Gold-Allrounderkarte mit Panzer-Schwerpunkt und starken Moralboni — Angelpunkt einer sowjetischen Durchbruchs-Stack.
